title: Solution Graph boundary input — a thin pair of refs (01 lecture baseline + 02 research).

research_bundle_ref.description: artifact:// ref to the g02 research hand-off. Its contract depends on research_bundle_kind: user_approved_research_bundle@1 for the reviewed/human-gated path, or solution_input_candidate@1 for the deterministic evidence_without_claim_assessment path (no Human Research Gate).

research_bundle_kind.description: Which g02 contract research_bundle_ref points at. Defaults to user_approved_research_bundle (legacy reviewed path) when absent. evidence_without_claim_assessment runs set solution_input_candidate.
